# External Data

This package repository does not include sample or production datasets.

The `inst/extdata/` folder is kept only as a documentation anchor in case
non-sensitive example inputs are added later.

Expected external inputs:

- land-cover vector file in GeoPackage or compatible vector format
- obstacles vector file in GeoPackage or compatible vector format
- DEM raster folder with `.tif` files
- DSM raster folder with `.tif` files
- meteorological Excel file with timestep data
